chunks.title: Wisdom Regarding Fools
chunks.reason: A collection of proverbs describing the nature and behavior of fools.

chunks.title: The Sluggard's Excuse
chunks.reason: A narrative description of the lazy man's excuses and behavior.

chunks.title: Wisdom on Strife and Whispers
chunks.reason: A series of metaphors illustrating the causes and effects of conflict.

chunks.title: The Deceptive Hater
chunks.reason: An analysis of a person who hides hatred behind fair speech.

chunks.title: Consequences of Deceit
chunks.reason: Two concluding proverbs about the retribution for deceit and flattery.
